property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.2.13-hotspot\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\ProgramData\UNIVALI\Portugol Studio;C:\Program Files\ApacheMaven\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\inael\anaconda3;C:\Users\inael\anaconda3\Library\mingw-w64\bin;C:\Users\inael\anaconda3\Library\usr\bin;C:\Users\inael\anaconda3\Library\bin;C:\Users\inael\anaconda3\Scripts;C:\Users\inael\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2021.3.2\bin;;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\5.0\bin;C:\Users\inael\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\inael\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\inael\Downloads\aircrack-ng-1.7-win\bin;C:\Users\inael\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: testTransacaoAtiva
testcase.system-err: out. 06, 2025 3:41:39 PM org.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper logPersistenceUnitInformation INFO: HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: loja_celular] out. 06, 2025 3:41:40 PM org.hibernate.Version logVersion INFO: HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.6.9.Final out. 06, 2025 3:41:40 PM org.hibernate.cache.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator initiateService INFO: HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled out. 06, 2025 3:41:40 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.connections.internal.DriverManagerConnectionProviderImpl configure WARN: HHH10001002: Using built-in connection pool (not intended for production use) out. 06, 2025 3:41:41 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.dialect.internal.DialectFactoryImpl constructDialect WARN: HHH90000025: MySQL8Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) out. 06, 2025 3:41:41 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.dialect.internal.DialectFactoryImpl logSelectedDialect WARN: HHH90000026: MySQL8Dialect has been deprecated; use org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect instead out. 06, 2025 3:41:41 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.env.internal.JdbcEnvironmentInitiator initiateService INFO: HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [jdbc:mysql://localhost/loja_celular] Database driver: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver Database version: 8.0 Autocommit mode: false Isolation level: undefined/unknown Minimum pool size: 1 Maximum pool size: 20 out. 06, 2025 3:41:44 PM org.hibernate.engine.transaction.jta.platform.internal.JtaPlatformInitiator initiateService INFO: HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration)

testcase.name: testConexaoBancoDados
testcase.system-err: out. 06, 2025 3:41:44 PM org.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper logPersistenceUnitInformation INFO: HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: loja_celular] out. 06, 2025 3:41:44 PM org.hibernate.cache.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator initiateService INFO: HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled out. 06, 2025 3:41:44 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.connections.internal.DriverManagerConnectionProviderImpl configure WARN: HHH10001002: Using built-in connection pool (not intended for production use) out. 06, 2025 3:41:44 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.dialect.internal.DialectFactoryImpl constructDialect WARN: HHH90000025: MySQL8Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) out. 06, 2025 3:41:44 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.dialect.internal.DialectFactoryImpl logSelectedDialect WARN: HHH90000026: MySQL8Dialect has been deprecated; use org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect instead out. 06, 2025 3:41:44 PM org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.env.internal.JdbcEnvironmentInitiator initiateService INFO: HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [jdbc:mysql://localhost/loja_celular] Database driver: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver Database version: 8.0 Autocommit mode: false Isolation level: undefined/unknown Minimum pool size: 1 Maximum pool size: 20 out. 06, 2025 3:41:45 PM org.hibernate.engine.transaction.jta.platform.internal.JtaPlatformInitiator initiateService INFO: HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration)
